text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe tells me that her body is weak.
Her words ring true, as a number of strange
ailments begin to afflict her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her body weight fluctuates rapidly in a short
period of time. On top of that, her toenails begin
to crack, interfering with her ability to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With these bizarre issues affecting her body one
after another, all I can offer her right now is
patience and support. Gathering every last bit of
my knowledge and expertise, I look for a
solution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, these strange happenings can't be
chalked up to her weak constitution... These
afflictions seem almost... supernatural.
